description: Material Passport for Gate 2.5 — SAP Quality Gate. Tracks the 8-item blocking quality gate between Stage 2 and Stage 3.

required_artifacts.name: SAP质量门闸报告
required_artifacts.description: Complete report of 8 SAP quality checks with pass/warn/fail status for each item.

required_artifacts.name: SAP完整性检查清单
required_artifacts.description: Itemized checklist verifying SAP covers all endpoints, populations, methods, and TFLs.

quality_gates.name: Estimands五要素完整
quality_gates.description: All 5 ICH E9(R1) estimand elements defined: population, treatment, endpoint, intercurrent events, summary measure.

quality_gates.name: 主要终点定义明确
quality_gates.description: Primary endpoint has operational definition, measurement method, and time window.

quality_gates.name: 分析方法适当性
quality_gates.description: Statistical methods match data types, distribution assumptions, and study design.

quality_gates.name: 样本量论证充分
quality_gates.description: Power analysis assumptions are justified; effect size is clinically meaningful.

quality_gates.name: 多重比较策略
quality_gates.description: Multiplicity control strategy specified for all secondary endpoints.

quality_gates.name: 敏感性分析完整
quality_gates.description: Pre-specified sensitivity analyses cover key assumptions and deviations.

quality_gates.name: 变量构造逻辑定义
quality_gates.description: All derived variables have explicit construction rules (formula, conditions, handling of missing).

quality_gates.name: 用户确认SAP
quality_gates.description: User has explicitly reviewed and approved the SAP document.
